# Explore More — e-bike rental in Sovata, Romania

> Explore More rents premium electric mountain bikes in Sovata (Mureș county,
> Transylvania, Romania). Ride to Bear Lake (Lacul Ursu), the salt hills and the
> forest trails around town. Helmet and lock are included with every rental, and
> an optional local tour guide is available. Booking is by phone or WhatsApp.

## Business details

- Name: Explore More
- Type: Bicycle rental service (electric mountain bikes / e-bikes)
- Location: Str. Câmpul Mic 57, 545500 Sovata, Mureș, Romania
- Coordinates: 46.6036, 25.0941
- Phone / WhatsApp: +40 753 538 524
- Website: https://exploremore.ro
- Hours: daily 09:00–19:00
- Languages spoken: Romanian, Hungarian, English

## Prices (RON / lei)

- 1 hour — 80 lei
- 2 hours — 120 lei
- 3 hours — 150 lei
- Whole day — 180 lei
- Optional local tour guide — 200 lei flat rate per tour
- Included with every rental: helmet and lock

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://exploremore.ro/): overview, prices, gallery, contact
- [Română](https://exploremore.ro/ro/): versiunea în limba română
- [Magyar](https://exploremore.ro/hu/): magyar nyelvű változat

## Contact & social

- Phone / WhatsApp: +40 753 538 524
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EbikeSovata
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/6pa9cu872GNFA6NK7
